title: armor chroma additions
description: Add more armor from popular mods, exclusive Fabric Chromatic Icons!
body:
Adds compatibility with the [armor chroma for fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-chroma-for-fabric) from popular mods.

compatible mods
- [aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae)
- [betterend](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) _(cardboard armor)_
- [dungeon now loading](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeon-now-loading)
- [friends and foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)
- [mutant monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters) 
- [myths of the sea](https://modrinth.com/mod/myths-of-the-sea)
- [mariums soulslike weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry)
- [the twilight forest unofficial](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-twilight-forest-unofficial)
